annual_opex_per_miu_usd.rationale: Digest states $2-3M range; base at mid-point. Bounds span the stated range without extrapolation.

achieved_fleet_uptime_fraction.rationale: Base centered on 0.90 commitment (DEFAULT, no anchored shift). Downside reflects MTTR risk and cannibalization-program failure scenarios noted in suggested estimation method; upside capped by realistic field maintenance.

achieved_pretreatment_reliability_fracti.rationale: Base centered on 0.85 threshold (DEFAULT). Downside reflects passive non-compliance risks from Issue 2; high capped below 1.0 by realistic archive-partner performance.

ai_flag_rate_fraction.rationale: Digest assumes ~0.10; upside to 0.15 reflects pilot FPR variability noted in Issue 3. Asymmetric: floor near digest assumption, upside captures stated tail.

phase1_miu_capex_per_unit_usd.rationale: Base at mid of stated $3-4M; upside extended to $4.5M for $450k-$1M retrofit shock from Risk 6. Asymmetric: stated range floor at $3M, retrofit risk one-sided.

phase1_vintage_acquisition_usd.rationale: Base combines $20M hardware buy and $6M vintage units allocation per digest. Upside reflects sourcing-feasibility risk on the 150-unit pool; low at the $20M hardware-only floor.
